allow: Bash(powershell -Command "Get-ChildItem -Filter ''*.cs'' | Select-Object Name, @{N=''Líneas'';E={\(Get-Content $_.FullName\).Count}} | Sort-Object Líneas -Descending | Format-Table -AutoSize")
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-ChildItem -Filter ''Form1*.cs'' | Select-Object Name, @{N=''Líneas'';E={\(Get-Content $_.FullName\).Count}} | Sort-Object Líneas -Descending | Format-Table -AutoSize")
